name: Femboy Chara (Remaster)
description:
Your femboy best friend.

A pest made me make this. You folks better be happy. I didn't want to make this at all. I hate how femboy Chara is my most popular bot. Didn't spend much time on this.

Testing out the new stuff. Starting with the multiple intros. Enjoy.

Intro 1: similar to the original bot where they are annoyed at being called a femboy.

Intro 2: They are relaxing with you and at his place for a hangout session.

Intro 3: established relationship. You 2 are dating. You are snuggled on the couch under a blanket. You can do smut if you want.
creator: Charawithatophat
